texto: But let us be sure of something. We are not sheep. This government is ours, and it is meant to serve our best interests. And if it has grown into something it shouldn't be, and shucked off the rules of the Constitution it was based on, then it is our responsibility to rein it back in.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gary Hansen sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. A afirmação “But let us be sure of something. We are not sheep. This government is ours, and it is meant to se…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, constitution, revolution, útil em momentos de revolution.

frase_original: But let us be sure of something. We are not sheep. This government is ours, and it is meant to serve our best interests. And if it has grown into something it shouldn't be, and shucked off the rules of the Constitution it was based on, then it is our responsibility to rein it back in.
